justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's date and time requests throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to pick a new time without offering concrete alternatives or a broader search.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was stuck in a loop, with the agent repeatedly checking for the same unavailable 9 AM slot across multiple days without proactively suggesting different times.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to break out of the 9 AM search loop and proactively offer alternative times, leading to many unproductive turns.

overall_notes: The agent demonstrated good temporal understanding but failed to effectively negotiate or recover from repeated unavailability, leading to a poor customer experience and low conversational efficiency.
